name: VEEVA SYSTEMS INC
summary: Veeva Systems is the leading provider of industry cloud solutions for the global life sciences industry, offering cloud software, data, and business consulting. Key products include Veeva Development Cloud, Veeva Quality Cloud, Veeva Commercial Cloud, and Veeva Data Cloud, serving pharmaceutical, biotechnology, and MedTech companies across R&D, quality, and commercial functions. Veeva operates as a Delaware public benefit corporation focused on making life sciences more productive.

products.name: Veeva Development Cloud
products.description: Suite of clinical, regulatory, and safety applications built on the Veeva Vault platform for life sciences R&D.

products.name: Veeva Clinical Platform
products.description: Connected technology ecosystem for clinical trial execution involving patients, sites, CROs, and sponsors.

products.name: Veeva EDC
products.description: Electronic data capture solution for clinical trial data management.

products.name: Veeva CDB
products.description: Tool for aggregating, cleaning, and transforming clinical trial data.

products.name: Veeva eTMF
products.description: Electronic trial master file application for clinical operations.

products.name: Veeva CTMS
products.description: Clinical trial management system for clinical operations.

products.name: Veeva Safety
products.description: Suite unifying drug safety content, reporting, signal detection, and adverse event processing.

products.name: Veeva RIM
products.description: Integrated regulatory information management suite for managing submissions and registration data.

products.name: Veeva Quality Cloud
products.description: Unified quality applications for content management, training, QA, and QC lab solutions on Vault.

products.name: Veeva QMS
products.description: Quality management system for integrated quality processes in life sciences.

products.name: Veeva Quality Docs
products.description: Manages regulated quality content throughout its lifecycle.

products.name: Veeva Commercial Cloud
products.description: Software and analytics solutions for life sciences sales, marketing, and medical affairs commercialization.

products.name: Vault CRM Suite
products.description: Next-generation CRM built on Veeva Vault for pharma/biotech sales, marketing, medical, and service teams.

products.name: Veeva CRM
products.description: Legacy CRM product built on Salesforce platform, supported until December 31, 2029.

products.name: Veeva Medical
products.description: Centralizes medical inquiries and content for medical affairs teams across channels and geographies.

products.name: Veeva PromoMats
products.description: End-to-end content and digital asset management solution for life sciences commercial content.

products.name: Veeva Crossix
products.description: Marketing analytics and audience targeting platform for biopharmaceutical brands.

products.name: Veeva Data Cloud
products.description: Modern data platform with reference, deep, and transaction data for clinical and commercial operations.

products.name: Veeva OpenData
products.description: Customer reference data on healthcare professionals and organizations for engagement and compliance.

products.name: Veeva Link
products.description: Deep data platform combining software automation and human curation for key people, accounts, and insights.

products.name: Veeva Compass
products.description: Suite of de-identified U.S. longitudinal patient, prescriber, and national data products.

products.name: Veeva AI
products.description: Agentic AI added to Veeva Vault platform with industry-specific agents for Veeva applications.

products.name: Veeva Vault
products.description: Proprietary cloud platform handling content and data, underlying most Veeva application suites.

partnerships.description: Veeva CRM and related applications are built on the Salesforce platform, supported until December 31, 2029.
